calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Jason Jungreis, Clerk: Karissa Shaw, not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Respondent Samih H. Zabadi appears in pro per.
Ms. Carla Eckhart appears as Respondent's witness.
Appellant Sultan A. Alkhraisat appears being represented by counsel Timothy Sears.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Witness and both litigants are sworn.

The court hears testimony from counsel Sears regarding the factual issues of the case.

Respondent Zabadi presents his opening statement to the court.

The court questions the litigants regarding their testimony and exhibits.

The court examines the evidence presented by both litigants.

The court hears closing arguments and the matter is taken under submission.

JUDGMENT RENDERED.
